creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm not sure its our job to make decisions based on subjective things like that.

While, and until the bitcoin ecosystem players get their stuff sorted out, we need to remain objective and aligned with the purpose of ports in general.

Since bitcore-core is synonymous with 'bitcoin' at the moment, the existing name for this port remains suitable, and it's more than likely users want it to remain up to date, independent to what the outcome of the current debate out there in the world is.

+1 on landing the update
